headline: Jim Cramer Says Forget Tech: Buy FedEx, Honeywell Aerospace, and GE Aerospace Instead
summary: Jim Cramer is steering investors away from NASDAQ and toward industrial blue chips, but one of his top picks fell nearly eight dollars even after landing what he called a ridiculous, record-breaking order. Here is why he still thinks the setup is worth it.

raw.headline: Jim Cramer Says Forget Tech: Buy FedEx, Honeywell Aerospace, and GE Aerospace Instead

headline: Gas Is Back at $4, but a Top Commodity Analyst Says the Real Pain Is in Diesel
summary: Gas is back at $4, but analyst Matt Smith says diesel near $172 a barrel is the real threat, fueling inflation risks and near-record refiner margins.

raw.headline: Gas Is Back at $4, but a Top Commodity Analyst Says the Real Pain Is in Diesel
raw.summary: Gas is back at $4, but analyst Matt Smith says diesel near $172 a barrel is the real threat, fueling inflation risks and near-record refiner margins.

headline: Jim Cramer Warns Investors Could Be 'Slaughtered' by Overloaded Tech Portfolios, but Backs Nvidia and Intel: 'It's Time to Go to Other Sectors'
summary: Cramer warned investors against overloading on volatile AI stocks, urged shift toward banks and industrials. Stays bullish on Nvidia, Intel.

raw.headline: Jim Cramer Warns Investors Could Be 'Slaughtered' by Overloaded Tech Portfolios, but Backs Nvidia and Intel: 'It's Time to Go to Other Sectors'
raw.summary: Cramer warned investors against overloading on volatile AI stocks, urged shift toward banks and industrials. Stays bullish on Nvidia, Intel.

headline: Cramer Says Dump Tech Before Intel, Tesla, Alphabet Earnings: Will Inverse-Cramer Strike?
summary: Jim Cramer dumped tech stocks ahead of Intel, Tesla, and Alphabet earnings, reviving bets on the Inverse-Cramer Effect.

raw.headline: Cramer Says Dump Tech Before Intel, Tesla, Alphabet Earnings: Will Inverse-Cramer Strike?
raw.summary: Jim Cramer dumped tech stocks ahead of Intel, Tesla, and Alphabet earnings, reviving bets on the Inverse-Cramer Effect.
